evidence.domain_risk: Working closely with product and business stakeholders to define and build meaningful product metrics
evidence.data_team_maturity: Improving our architecture (cloud-based and always evolving) based on what brings the most impact to cost reduction and speed
evidence.jd_authorship: Developing analytical products such as data models, dashboards, reports and tooling to enable self-serve reporting and analysis for stakeholders
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Working closely with product and business stakeholders to define and build meaningful product metrics
evidence.autonomy_level: Taking ownership of projects from scoping to delivery and adoption, working autonomously
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Developing analytical products such as data models, dashboards, reports and tooling
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Developing a broad range of analytical products spans creating new tooling alongside dashboards and reports that likely extend existing reporting infrastructure, indicating mixed work.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI skill signals; best practices framing is generic technical excellence without AI user or enabler indicators.
evidence.testing_framing: Taking ownership of projects from scoping to delivery and adoption
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Broad project ownership mentioned but not tied to quality/testing/data contracts as a named responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Improving our architecture based on what brings the most impact to cost reduction and speed
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Pure delivery and efficiency framing; no SLO, incident, regulatory, or trust/data-quality risk language.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD consistently emphasizes software engineering fundamentals, architecture, and best practices as the primary work orientation, with no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: While Trade Republic is fintech (high-risk sector), the JD language lacks explicit financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory signals, suggesting this role's data work impacts operational decisions rather than direct financial/regulatory consequences.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Language of 'improving' existing architecture suggests established function with room to scale, not early-stage greenfield nor multiple teams at mature scale.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD includes some technical specificity (named product types, data pipeline stages) alongside generic boilerplate action verbs, without scale, tool context, or methodology detail.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary focus on defining product metrics and enabling product/business stakeholders, combined with emphasis on analytical products, indicates this is fundamentally a product analytics role.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role has strategic ownership and autonomy over project execution and metric definition, but operates within the direction and priorities set by product and business stakeholders.
